cleaned_html_body:
Republic Clothing’s imports of knitted garments (HS 6110, 6104) suggest a strong demand for quality knitwear. We’ve worked with buyers like you who source from suppliers like Sun Kee Woollen and Hangzhou Ya Long, and we’re confident we can complement your existing supply chain.

Arooj Enterprises specializes in knitted and woven garments, with a capacity of 150,000 units per month. Our ISO 14001, SEDEX, and OEKO-TEX certifications ensure that our products meet the highest standards, aligning well with your import profile. We’ve supplied similar products to brands in the USA, UK, and EU, so we understand your market’s needs.

Our vertical integration allows us to control every step of production, ensuring consistent quality and competitive pricing—a key advantage for buyers like you who prioritize both.

Would a quick call this week make sense to explore how we can support your knitwear needs?

Best regards,
Asad Irfan | Senior Marketing Manager | Arooj Enterprises | www.texbase.com
